title: 有幾多人願意放低曬香港嘅一切去移民?

replies.msg:
啱啱係到諗，移民去先進國家嘅門檻並無想像中咁高

你儲到四十萬就可以日本開公司做生意，你買個同市區15分鐘車程嘅一千呎全新獨立屋包埋全部雜費都係二百萬左右 ; 你無兩球係手嘅，幾千蚊港紙都可以租個比香港好好多嘅地方住

相比起香港一個400呎未連雜費都要六球嘅單位，去日本似乎比香港更容易生存同生活

前提係你肯用幾年時間儲到第一筆錢、學外語、有熱誠去自己做小生意，同埋最重要係有決心要拋下香港嘅全部屋企人朋友回憶去一個全新嘅地方

幾十年前又係唐餐館，今日又係唐餐館。

的確係好撚黑暗 但好多香港人情願咁都想過到外國生活，多數都係為下一代姐

Agreed, my secondary school days being bullied by 4-5 classmates. Then spent 5 years in the States for college days.

When came back to HK in end of 1997, that kind of everything seems changed, even the airport from Kai Tak I leave to Chek Lap Kok (I did not back to HK for holiday after 96 Christamas...) made similar feeling in my mind I had a trip back from Interstellar, if you know what I mean...

Worse thing is... gf at that time broke up after I back.

So there were nothing left for me when I back in late 97, only sad, sorrow and being unemployed for 6 months.

I will regard the States as my second home no matter what, it just what being attached namely elder parents need to take care of, my wife's family, and my children made me definitely not a possible situation to say leave this place.

replies.msg:
Well I am on a different boat. I had been bullied since young age in Hong Kong until F.5 and with very little friends. But once I headed to Canada for school, I realize people are friendly and welcoming to me to a point I wasn't sure how to react. I found myself flinching at times. I had similar problem in university being around Hongkongers but it was much less severe. It was the first time I learnt to be a friend of someone else instead of pleasing and avoiding conflict.

Maybe I was lucky that I had a chance to start my career here better than in HK and have less family burden that allowed me to stay. Either way, I felt more attached to Canada than HK now, and the last time I went back reinforced the feeling. I sometimes feel guilty for doing this to my family back in HK that's why I am not cheaping out on family visit trips but I gotta do what's right for me.

quote.msg:
Agreed, my secondary school days being bullied by 4-5 classmates. Then spent 5 years in the States for college days.

When came back to HK in end of 1997, that kind of everything seems changed, even the airport from Kai Tak I leave to Chek Lap Kok (I did not back to HK for holiday after 96 Christamas...) made similar feeling in my mind I had a trip back from Interstellar, if you know what I mean...

Worse thing is... gf at that time broke up after I back.

So there were nothing left for me when I back in late 97, only sad, sorrow and being unemployed for 6 months.

I will regard the States as my second home no matter what, it just what being attached namely elder parents need to take care of, my wife's family, and my children made me definitely not a possible situation to say leave this place.

Well I am on a different boat. I had been bullied since young age in Hong Kong until F.5 and with very little friends. But once I headed to Canada for school, I realize people are friendly and welcoming to me to a point I wasn't sure how to react. I found myself flinching at times. I had similar problem in university being around Hongkongers but it was much less severe. It was the first time I learnt to be a friend of someone else instead of pleasing and avoiding conflict.

Maybe I was lucky that I had a chance to start my career here better than in HK and have less family burden that allowed me to stay. Either way, I felt more attached to Canada than HK now, and the last time I went back reinforced the feeling. I sometimes feel guilty for doing this to my family back in HK that's why I am not cheaping out on family visit trips but I gotta do what's right for me.

我都諗緊移民，因為實在唔係得一個原因令我唔係幾鍾意呢度，一就係人太多，返學放學係永遠要迫車，每日入百五件仲未計拖喼客，人一多就多磨擦，冇乜邊日行地鐵站係唔會同人撞，尋日大雨先因為收遮唔小心打到個鬼佬，條街窄冇計 。

第二係人既心態價值觀，我發覺我同好多香港人諗野幾唔同，其中一個就係佢地好識計到盡。就最近返會展，我d同事都會左r右r,睇下有咩著數，儲儲埋埋臨走有個拎左人成袋野。唔係話唔得，我有時都會用eatago 去食野，但係因為我有需要同真係想食嘛。可能就係因為生活係香港令人太重視個人利益（資源少），香港人冇乜識實淺團隊精神（就算知要團結都好），就算我玩開運動十幾年，我（圈子入面）冇遇到過所謂teamate or leader係有positive effect，人人都太有諗法。

香港生活的確係方便，我十分認同，但係人一多排m記塞車半個鐘等等仲諗邊度最抵就未必做到方便呢樣野。我兩年後grad左人工唔係問題，但係2047就到，有好多野係有錢買唔到，對比返十年前既新聞同而家我見唔到香港有進步。之後都唔會買樓。想目光廣闊d,移民當係比個選擇自己。


p.s.純粹抒發我自己諗法。

除左技術移民好似重有方法移到架巴打

quote.msg:
以溫哥華為例
今次排華都唔怪得人
80年代尾果陣都有排華
果陣係因為太多香港人過去買樓
d本地人嘈話香港人炒貴曬d樓

問題係而家大陸人唔只係炒貴曬d樓
加拿大文化最講「同理心」
班大陸移民也好，大陸留學生又好
好多都聲大夾惡，唔守規矩，知法犯法
專搵法律漏洞攞着數
齋係講日常生活，打尖霸位日日發生
仲要嘴邈邈唔講英文亦從來唔道歉

我小學嘅鬼婆老師以前撐我哋班ESL撐到出面
而家佢搬到遠遠，話唔想再見到中國人
搞乜連當初覺得我哋班新移民抵幫嘅
而家竟然態度轉變曬？

我試過開門俾個女士，佢呆咗問我係咪中國人
我話我係香港人
位女士好驚訝咁話佢第一次見到有中國人開門俾人！
我再向佢重申一次，我係香港人，而且係本地長大
跟住佢就話：難怪你會同佢地唔同
佢係讃我，但果刻我除咗苦笑都唔知可以點

所以香港人又好中國人又好，唔好成日話人歧視，跟本就係自己仆街黑人憎
你對人好，人就對你好。你對人差，人地都唔會對你客氣。
反而呢到對原住民相當唔友善

冇辦法，人哋個政府係民選出嚟
做錯嘢要下台，多多藉口嘅會俾媒體鬧爆
就算做吓樣都好，點都唔可以只位少數人攞咗著數就算

有得揀係緊要
但揀完唔掂嘅可以叫佢收皮呢吓先正嘛！
（係，再揀嘅可以更差，但唔洗同佢鬥命長丫）
